# Muhammad Rafiq

## About
Muhammad Rafiq is a full-stack developer, software engineer, and AI/ML enthusiast focused on modern web applications, automation, system design, and practical AI implementation.

## Site Overview
Primary website: https://rafiq.dev/
Blog: https://rafiq.dev/blog

## Core Topics
- Full-stack web development with React, Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript
- AI/ML engineering, LLM applications, and agent systems
- DevOps, cloud deployment, and software testing
- System design, architecture, and developer education

## Key Content
- Portfolio and contact information: https://rafiq.dev/
- Articles and technical guides: https://rafiq.dev/blog
- Project case studies and engineering insights: https://rafiq.dev/blog

## Content Style
The site publishes technical, practical, and implementation-focused content with clear explanations, architecture patterns, and real-world examples.
